creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
I am afraid, the porting of TeXLive is taking too long... I'd like to
add LyX-1.6.3 on its own meanwhile -- only some of the features require
TeXLive, most of the program works fine with teTeX. Please, arrange a
repo-copy of print/lyx to print/lyx16.

Thanks! Yours,

    -mi
